content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course entering the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 22 + 5 = 27
Waypoint 27: (7.010037, 1.025767)
Car position: (6.248360, 0.670601)
Bearing = atan2(1.025767 - 0.670601, 7.010037 - 6.248360) = atan2(0.355166, 0.761677) = atan2(0.4663) ≈ 25.02°
Current heading: 2.723°
Delta = 25.02 - 2.723 = 22.30° → moderate left needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead (entering the right-hand loop); delta to waypoint 27 is +22.3° (left), so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large left-curving loop (in math convention, heading increases) begins around waypoint 24-30",
    "Car is nearly centered on track, delta ~22° confirms entering the curve",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-25° entering curve at speed 1.5",
    "After the right curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves",
    "Waypoints 0-23 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",
    "Curve sharpens at wp27-30 (y increases rapidly), may need more steering soon",
    "Car heading stays near 0° on the straight — minimal correction needed on straight",
    "Delta ~22° at wp27 confirms entering the curve — maintain moderate left steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.9498, 6.0516, 6.1475, 6.2484],
    "y": [0.6512, 0.6526, 0.6570, 0.6706],
    "yaw": [-1.060, -0.641, 0.120, 2.723]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 22.30,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
